publication_plan.content:
I spent 3 weeks choosing between PostgreSQL and MongoDB for a product with 0 users.

That's the stack trap.

Here's how to escape it (1/5)

The stack trap: spending weeks perfecting your tech instead of shipping to users.

I fell into it. 3 weeks debating databases for a product no one had seen yet.

The fix? Default to what you know. Optimize later. Ship now.
